meta.title: About AWS Overseas | Sourcing & Export Partner in India
meta.description: AWS Overseas connects global buyers with trusted Indian manufacturers — verifying suppliers, inspecting quality, and managing export shipping so you can source from India with confidence.

hero.title: Your Trusted Bridge to Indian Manufacturing
hero.subtitle: We connect global buyers with verified Indian manufacturers — vetting suppliers, safeguarding quality, and handling the export process end to end, so sourcing from India feels like working with a partner on the ground.

companyStory.title: Our Story
companyStory.description: AWS Overseas was founded on a simple observation: global buyers wanted to source from India, but the distance, language, and unfamiliar processes made it risky to go it alone. We started by building real relationships with manufacturers across India's production hubs — visiting factories, vetting capabilities, and earning the kind of trust that can't be arranged over email. Over time, we layered in the export knowledge and shipping expertise those relationships needed to matter: quality assurance before goods ever leave the factory, documentation done right the first time, and freight handled by people who understand both ends of the trade. Today, that combination — supplier relationships, sourcing know-how, and shipping execution — is what lets a buyer anywhere in the world source from India with the same confidence as buying down the street.

mission.title: Connect global buyers with trusted Indian manufacturers.
mission.description: We exist to make sourcing from India straightforward for buyers everywhere — pairing every order with a verified manufacturer and standing behind the quality and delivery of what they produce.

vision.title: Become the preferred sourcing and export partner for businesses worldwide.
vision.description: We're building toward a future where 'sourcing from India' and 'working with AWS Overseas' mean the same thing to buyers worldwide — the first call for anyone who wants a trusted supplier, not just a shipment.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear pricing, honest supplier information, and straight answers at every stage of sourcing and shipping.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Every order is inspected against agreed standards before it leaves the factory, not discovered on arrival.

items.title: Supplier Trust
items.description: We vet manufacturers on the ground and maintain the relationships that keep them accountable to our buyers.

items.title: Compliance
items.description: Export documentation and regulatory requirements handled correctly, so shipments move without surprises.

items.title: Customer Success
items.description: We measure ourselves by whether our buyers reorder — not by whether a single shipment cleared.

items.title: Long-Term Partnership
items.description: We invest in relationships built to outlast a single order, with both buyers and suppliers.

globalNetwork.title: A Sourcing Network Built for Global Buyers
globalNetwork.description: Our sourcing partners across India's manufacturing regions, combined with our shipping network, enable seamless exports to buyers worldwide — one relationship for finding the right supplier and getting their product to your door.

certifications.title: Compliance & Verification
certifications.description: Trust with AWS Overseas isn't a single certificate — it's a process we run on every order, from the factory floor to the paperwork that clears customs.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Global Buyers Choose AWS Overseas

items.title: Verified Supplier Relationships
items.description: We know our manufacturers personally — their capacity, their quality, and their reliability — before we ever recommend them.

items.title: Sourcing and Export Under One Roof
items.description: One team handles supplier selection, quality assurance, and export shipping — no handoff between disconnected vendors.

items.title: Quality Assurance at the Source
items.description: Goods are inspected before they leave India, catching issues while they're still cheap and easy to fix.

items.title: Export Knowledge That Prevents Delays
items.description: Correct documentation and compliance handling from the start, so shipments don't stall at customs.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: Sourcing costs, freight, and duties quoted upfront, with no hidden markups along the way.

items.title: A Partner, Not a Vendor
items.description: Dedicated support from first enquiry through delivery — and every reorder after that.

cta.title: Let's Find Your Next Supplier in India
cta.description: Whether you need a manufacturer sourced and verified, an existing supplier relationship managed, or your next order shipped and cleared, AWS Overseas handles it as one connected partnership.
